messages.content: use the view tool to show the first 10 lines of build.sh
use the view tool to show the first 10 lines of build.sh

1  #!/bin/bash
   2  # Build script for ollamadev single-file binary
   3  
   4  SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
   5  BUILD_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/dist/release"
   6  
   7  mkdir -p "$BUILD_DIR"
   8  
   9  echo "Building ollamadev..."
  10

<tool_call>
name: view
params: path=build.sh offset=0 limit=10
</tool_call>
